title: iberis atlantica
intro: Iberis atlantica, also known as the rock candy or sweet rocket, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant's medicinal properties include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Iberis atlantica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
